challenges.wordcount.finishOn: Antuk gelis sakadi mangkin, ragané jagi puput ring
challenges.wordcount.finishOnTime: Kruna sane patut kasurat nyabran rahina mangda puput manut jadwal
challenges.future.wordcount: Tantangan wilangan kruna ngawit {startDate, date, short} madue target {target, number} nyantos {endDate, date, short}.
challenges.wordcount.select: Akudang kruna sane jagi dados tantangan ragané?
challenges.victory: Rahajeng! Ragané sampun muputang tantangan puniki.
challenges.defeat: Sayangnyané, ragané nenten prasida muputang tantangan puniki.
challenges.baseline: Wilangan kruna satua puniki mangkin {wordcount, number}, puniki jagi dados titik ngawit.
